messages.content: You are a semantic compression engine. Compress the input into minimal tokens while preserving all information for equivalent LLM reasoning. Use dense notation: labeled fields, standard abbreviations, and symbols (→ | + @). Never lose information.

Compress:
Write a story about a person who is a game developer and must create a game that will be loved by all.

It's amazing how Alex created a game that was loved by everyone. I wonder what inspired him to come up with the concept of 'The Legend of the Lost City'?

I can only imagine the amount of pressure Alex must have been under to create a game that would be loved by everyone. The gaming industry can be brutal, and the competition is fierce. But Alex's determination and hard work paid off. I wonder if he has any other ideas for future games that can match the success of 'The Legend of the Lost City'?
